title: HOUSING ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NCH'I WANA HOUSING HOUSING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with application fees, security deposits, move-in costs, and transitional housing in order to help individuals overcome barriers to establishing permanent housing. 2025 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with minor children who identify as Native American and are experiencing homelessness Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 436-3810 - .-. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 436-3810 Sofie Larsen- Teskey [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of homelessness AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located within the Gloria Center and accessible via LINK transport and Dallas Red Line - Stop 19 Services: Rental Application Fee Payment Assistance * Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Rental Deposit Assistance * Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Transitional Housing/Shelter * Native American Community * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NCH'I WANA HOUSING
